chapter_title.en: Chapter 32 – Marriage of the Zimmy woman (under the responsibility)

text: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ خَالِدٍ الْبَرْقِيِّ عَنْ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ سَمَاعَةَ بْنِ مِهْرَانَ قَالَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْيَهُودِيَّةِ وَ النَّصْرَانِيَّةِ أَ يَتَزَوَّجُهَا الرَّجُلُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمَةِ قَالَ لَا وَ يَتَزَوَّجُ الْمُسْلِمَةَ عَلَى الْيَهُودِيَّةِ وَ النَّصْرَانِيَّةِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid Al Barqy, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at Bin Mihran who said,

‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the Jewish woman and the Christian woman, can the man marry her upon (as additional wife) the Muslim woman?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, but he can marry the Muslim woman upon (as additional wife) the Jewish woman and the Christian woman’.
